name: AudioPlayer

parameters.name: Src
parameters.description: URL of the audio file to play. Bound directly to the underlying <audio> element's src; required.

parameters.name: Autoplay
parameters.description: Starts playback automatically once the media can play. Subject to browser autoplay policy — the UI reflects actual play/pause state from the element's own events, not this flag.

parameters.name: Loop
parameters.description: Restarts playback from the beginning when the track ends.

parameters.name: ShowDownload
parameters.description: Shows a download link (rendered as an anchor with download) pointing at Src. Hidden when Src is empty.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Track title shown above the transport controls. Omitted from the layout entirely when both Title and Artist are empty.

parameters.name: Artist
parameters.description: Artist name shown beneath Title in a smaller, muted style.

parameters.name: Cover
parameters.description: Custom cover art content rendered in the leading artwork tile. Falls back to a music-note icon when not provided.

parameters.name: PreloadMode
parameters.description: Value forwarded to the native <audio> element's preload attribute ("none", "metadata", or "auto"). Defaults to "metadata".

parameters.name: SkipSeconds
parameters.description: Seconds to jump per skip-button press / arrow key. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: PlaybackRates
parameters.description: Selectable playback rates, cycled by the rate button. Defaults to 0.5×, 1×, 1.25×, 1.5×, 2×.

parameters.name: ShowVolume
parameters.description: Show the volume slider next to the mute toggle.

parameters.name: OnTimeUpdate
parameters.description: Fires on every playback-position update (native timeupdate, plus skip/seek actions) with the new current time in seconds.

parameters.name: OnEnded
parameters.description: Fires when playback reaches the end of the track.

parameters.name: OnPlay
parameters.description: Fires when playback starts, driven by the element's own play event (not the button click) so it reflects actual playback state.

parameters.name: OnPause
parameters.description: Fires when playback pauses, driven by the element's own pause event (not the button click) so it reflects actual playback state.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer wrapper.

events.name: OnTimeUpdate
events.description: Fires on every playback-position update (native timeupdate, plus skip/seek actions) with the new current time in seconds.

events.name: OnEnded
events.description: Fires when playback reaches the end of the track.

events.name: OnPlay
events.description: Fires when playback starts, driven by the element's own play event (not the button click) so it reflects actual playback state.

events.name: OnPause
events.description: Fires when playback pauses, driven by the element's own pause event (not the button click) so it reflects actual playback state.

examples.title: With cover art
examples.code:
<AudioPlayer Src="https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2-CoolEdit.mp3"
             Title="Piano sample"
             Artist="Cool Edit demo">
    <Cover>
        <Image Src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511671782779-c97d3d27a1d4?w=160&h=160&fit=crop"
               Alt="Album cover"
               Class="h-16 w-16 rounded-md object-cover" />
    </Cover>
</AudioPlayer>

examples.title: Looping + download
examples.code:
<AudioPlayer Src="https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2-CoolEdit.mp3"
             Title="Looping piano sample"
             Artist="Cool Edit demo"
             Loop="true"
             Autoplay="false"
             ShowDownload="true" />

examples.title: Playback events
examples.code:
<AudioPlayer Src="https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2-CoolEdit.mp3"
             Title="Tracked sample"
             Artist="Cool Edit demo"
             OnPlay="HandlePlay"
             OnPause="HandlePause"
             OnEnded="HandleEnded" />

@@code {
    private string _lastEvent = "(none)";
    private void HandlePlay() => _lastEvent = "play";
    private void HandlePause() => _lastEvent = "pause";
    private void HandleEnded() => _lastEvent = "ended";
}

slots.name: Cover
slots.description: Custom cover art content rendered in the leading artwork tile. Falls back to a music-note icon when not provided.

mdSummary:
# AudioPlayer

Audio Player component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/audio-player

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AudioPlayer | Src | `string?` | `` | URL of the audio file to play. Bound directly to the underlying <audio> element's src; required. |
| AudioPlayer | Autoplay | `bool` | `` | Starts playback automatically once the media can play. Subject to browser autoplay policy — the UI reflects actual play/pause state from the element's own events, not this flag. |
| AudioPlayer | Loop | `bool` | `` | Restarts playback from the beginning when the track ends. |
| AudioPlayer | ShowDownload | `bool` | `` | Shows a download link (rendered as an anchor with download) pointing at Src. Hidden when Src is empty. |
| AudioPlayer | Title | `string?` | `` | Track title shown above the transport controls. Omitted from the layout entirely when both Title and Artist are empty. |
| AudioPlayer | Artist | `string?` | `` | Artist name shown beneath Title in a smaller, muted style. |
| AudioPlayer | Cover | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom cover art content rendered in the leading artwork tile. Falls back to a music-note icon when not provided. |
| AudioPlayer | PreloadMode | `string?` | `"metadata"` | Value forwarded to the native <audio> element's preload attribute ("none", "metadata", or "auto"). Defaults to "metadata". |
| AudioPlayer | ShowSkipButtons | `bool` | `true` | Show skip-back / skip-forward buttons (±SkipSeconds). |
| AudioPlayer | SkipSeconds | `int` | `10` | Seconds to jump per skip-button press / arrow key. Defaults to 10. |
| AudioPlayer | ShowPlaybackRate | `bool` | `true` | Show the playback-rate cycle button (0.5× → 2×). |
| AudioPlayer | PlaybackRates | `double[]` | `{ 0.5, 1.0, 1.25, 1.5, 2.0 }` | Selectable playback rates, cycled by the rate button. Defaults to 0.5×, 1×, 1.25×, 1.5×, 2×. |
| AudioPlayer | ShowVolume | `bool` | `true` | Show the volume slider next to the mute toggle. |
| AudioPlayer | OnTimeUpdate | `EventCallback<double>` | `` | Fires on every playback-position update (native timeupdate, plus skip/seek actions) with the new current time in seconds. |
| AudioPlayer | OnEnded | `EventCallback` | `` | Fires when playback reaches the end of the track. |
| AudioPlayer | OnPlay | `EventCallback` | `` | Fires when playback starts, driven by the element's own play event (not the button click) so it reflects actual playback state. |
| AudioPlayer | OnPause | `EventCallback` | `` | Fires when playback pauses, driven by the element's own pause event (not the button click) so it reflects actual playback state. |
| AudioPlayer | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer wrapper. |
| AudioPlayer | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer wrapper. |

## Slots
- `Cover` (AudioPlayer) — Custom cover art content rendered in the leading artwork tile. Falls back to a music-note icon when not provided.

## Events
- `OnTimeUpdate` (`EventCallback<double>`) — Fires on every playback-position update (native timeupdate, plus skip/seek actions) with the new current time in seconds.
- `OnEnded` (`EventCallback`) — Fires when playback reaches the end of the track.
- `OnPlay` (`EventCallback`) — Fires when playback starts, driven by the element's own play event (not the button click) so it reflects actual playback state.
- `OnPause` (`EventCallback`) — Fires when playback pauses, driven by the element's own pause event (not the button click) so it reflects actual playback state.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<AudioPlayer />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/AudioPlayer/AudioPlayer.razor`
